info.title: dotnet-terraform
info.description: This package contains the Terraform binaries as provided on the Terraform projects GitHub page for use as a .NET tool. The version of this package matches the Terraform version.

options.name: -chdir
options.description:
Switch to a different working directory before executing the
given subcommand.

options.name: -help
options.description: Show this help output, or the help for a specified subcommand.
